benefits.name: In Patient Hospitalization
benefits.description: Coverage for hospitalization in a hospital on the advice of a medical practitioner.

benefits.name: Pre-Hospitalization Medical Expenses
benefits.description: Medical expenses incurred during a predefined number of days preceding hospitalization.

benefits.name: Post-Hospitalization Medical Expenses
benefits.description: Medical expenses incurred during a predefined number of days immediately after discharge from the hospital.

benefits.name: Day Care Treatment
benefits.description: Coverage for medical expenses incurred for day care treatment.

benefits.name: Domiciliary Hospitalization
benefits.description: Coverage for medical expenses incurred for domiciliary hospitalization.

benefits.name: Emergency Ambulance
benefits.description: Coverage for ambulance charges incurred for transportation to the nearest hospital.

benefits.name: Organ Donor Cover
benefits.description: Coverage for medical expenses incurred for an organ donor's treatment.

benefits.name: Maternity Cover
benefits.description: Coverage for medical expenses related to pregnancy and childbirth.

benefits.name: Double Sum Insured for Critical Illness
benefits.description: Double the basic sum insured which is specified in the policy as opted.

benefits.name: Room Rent Capping
benefits.description: Eligibility of room rent or room rent category applicable for the insured under the policy schedule.

exclusions.name: Pre-existing Conditions
exclusions.description: Coverage is not available for pre-existing conditions during the waiting period.

exclusions.name: Cosmetic Surgery
exclusions.description: Cosmetic or plastic surgery is not covered.

exclusions.name: Pre-Existing Diseases
exclusions.description: Expenses related to the treatment of a pre-existing disease are excluded until the expiry of 36 months of continuous coverage.

exclusions.name: Specified Disease/Procedure Waiting Period
exclusions.description: Expenses related to the treatment of listed conditions shall be excluded until the expiry of 24 months of continuous coverage.

exclusions.name: 30-Day Waiting Period
exclusions.description: Expenses related to the treatment of any illness within 30 days are excluded, except claims arising due to an accident.

exclusions.name: Food Charges
exclusions.description: Food charges other than patient's diet provided by hospital.

exclusions.name: Oxygen Cylinder
exclusions.description: Oxygen cylinder for usage outside the hospital.

exclusions.name: Prescription Charges
exclusions.description: Expenses related to prescription on discharge not covered.
